title: Define Ownership Model and Managed Region boundaries
outOfScope: Update, rollback, disable/enable, uninstall, purge, release publication, and final plan cleanup behavior
Adopter project-owned files outside the template repository

sources.reason: Defines the Ownership and Managed Region objectives, scope, acceptance, and negative scenarios.
Existing fact bundle is the persistence boundary that the ownership classifier must validate.
Existing installer classification and shared-file handling establish compatibility boundaries.
Defines repository governance and evidence terminology.

riskAssessment.reason: Ownership classification and marker parsing are fail-closed boundaries for future update and uninstall Work Items.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized serial execution of all plan Work Items and this Work Item is ready for bounded implementation.

preReviewWarnings: Unknown ownership, missing markers, region drift, and historical evidence must fail closed without mutation.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The ownership schema exposes template, project, shared, generated, and historical decisions with explicit reasons.
Shared files accept only explicit BEGIN/END AI Cockpit managed regions and reject missing, duplicate, nested, or drifted boundaries.
Project-owned and historical files are preserved by default; unknown ownership or invalid regions produces a fail-closed decision.
Positive and negative ownership/region tests and reference documentation cover path-misclassification and historical-modification scenarios.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The installed fact bundle currently records ownership labels but does not provide a decision-grade classifier or explicit managed-region boundary parser, so later update and uninstall operations could fall back to path guessing.
constraints: Keep this Work Item limited to ownership and managed-region facts; do not implement lifecycle mutations.
Treat project-owned and historical evidence as protected and fail closed on ambiguity or marker drift.
Use deterministic standard-library behavior and document every public helper.
intent.rationale: Explicit ownership and region evidence is the safety boundary that lets later lifecycle operations preserve project content and historical audit evidence.

rawUserRequest: 查收评审，总结，工单列表（列表最后加上：清理执行计划文档），做成修改执行计划的文档。计划里明确写清楚，每个工单要走完整的流程（包括PR，清理分支），然后循环执行下一个工单，直到全部工单完整为止。需要跟我确认的，写清楚，已经得到我的授权。走完当前文档的流程。

declaredIntent.summary: Serially implement the current Installed Lifecycle plan with full Work Item lifecycle closure.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: All five ownership classes are classified with explicit evidence.
Shared managed-region missing, duplicate, nested, or drifted markers fail closed.
Path lookalikes and historical evidence are protected from update/uninstall decisions.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the serial Installed Lifecycle plan execution, including governance, tests, docs, PRs, merges, closure, and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
